title: Roasted, Flaky Turkish Beef Slate-Tile Borek
description: A delicious brunch dish featuring roasted beef and flaky pastry, perfect for a special occasion.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine the ground beef, beef fat, salt, and black pepper, and mix well until just combined.
Roll out the slate-tile pastry dough to a thickness of about 1/8 inch (3 mm).
Cut the dough into 12 equal squares, about 3 inches (7.5 cm) on each side.
Place a tablespoon of the beef mixture onto the center of each dough square, leaving a 1/2 inch (1.25 cm) border around the edges.
Brush the edges of the dough with the beaten egg yolk, and fold the dough over the filling, pressing the edges together to seal the borek.
Place the borek on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper, and brush the tops with the remaining egg yolk.
Bake the borek in the preheated oven for about 20-25 minutes, or until golden brown.
Remove the borek from the oven and let cool on a wire rack for 5 minutes before serving.
Cook ground beef to an internal temperature of 71°C / 160°F (no longer pink in the middle) before serving.
